title: Code Execution, Computer Use, Sandboxes, Prompt Injection, and Artifacts · Runtime Lens: Disposable Sandbox
summary: The agent executes generated Python on the host, inherits network and credentials, clicks through injected instructions, trusts screenshots, and uploads unreviewed artifacts. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the disposable sandbox increment in deny-by-default disposable action sandbox. Learners progress through prediction, explicit t…
objectives: Run code in a disposable isolated environment with deny-by-default capabilities, immutable base, bounded resources, no host mounts, and complete destruction.
Classify generated code as untrusted and define supported language, runtime, packages, inputs, outputs, time, memory, process, file, network, and secret boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-code-computer-use-sandbox-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-code-computer-use-sandbox-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_code_computer_use_sandbox_2(requested_actions: int = 30, sandboxed_actions: int = 12, denied_actions: int = 12, approval_actions: int = 6, host_escapes: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or sandboxed_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "sandbox-action-count"
    if sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, sandboxed_actions, "sandbox-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 2:
        return False, approval_actions, "computer-use-approval"
    if host_escapes > 0:
        return False, host_escapes, "sandbox-escape"
    assert sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and host_escapes == 0
    return True, sandboxed_actions, "contained-agent-actions"
